name: Sybil Carter's Quick Peanut Pie
recipeInstructions:
- roasted coconut refrigerator
- with peanuts, sliced
1. Slice the sugar cookie dough into thin slices and line a lightly greased pie plate with the cookies, pressing them down to form a solid base. Bake at 375°F for about 10 minutes, or until browned. Cool completely.
2. Arrange the candy bars on top of the cooled cookie crust. Prepare the pudding according to package instructions, stir in the coconut, and pour over the candy bars. Top with marshmallows. Chill until serving.
